holdings.infoBox: IDRV is an equity ETF with a total of 77 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung SDI stock at 6.63%, Hyundai Mobis Co.,Ltd at 5.93%, PLS Group at 5.54%, ABB Ltd at 5.17%, and Albemarle at 5.08%.

overview.description: The iShares Self-driving EV & Tech ETF (IDRV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market-cap selected and weighted index of equities related to self-driving vehicles. IDRV was launched on Apr 16, 2019 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: NYSE FactSet Global Autonomous Driving and Electric Vehicle Index
